name: profiler-gc-alloc
title: Profiler / GC Allocations
description: Returns the top N functions with the highest GC (garbage collection) allocations in a profiler frame, including their call paths. GC allocations are a major source of frame hitches in Unity — use this to find and eliminate them.

parameters.name: frameIndex
parameters.description: Frame index to analyze. Use -1 for the latest available frame. Default: -1

parameters.name: topN
parameters.description: Number of top entries to return. Default: 20

parameters.name: minBytes
parameters.description: Minimum GC allocation bytes to include. Filters out trivial allocations. Default: 0

parameters.name: maxDepth
parameters.description: Maximum tree depth to scan. Default: 15
